user_query: Child has some messy lunches that won't pack well for school - delete a few options that sounds hard to transport or eat cleanly.
nodes_to_delete: Root > MealPlan_Version 6 > Child > Day 3 > Lunch > Bean Burrito Bowl — Berry Boost Style
Root > MealPlan_Version 6 > Child > Day 7 > Lunch > Soba Noodle Bowl — Garlic-Ginger Wrap
reasoning: The user requested the removal of 'messy' lunches that are hard to transport or eat cleanly. The Bean Burrito Bowl and Soba Noodle Bowl were selected as they contain loose ingredients and sauces/dressings that are prone to spilling. The Salmon Salad Wrap, Teriyaki Chicken Bowl (compact rice/chicken), and Veggie Quesadilla (contained/pressed) are generally more stable and easier for a child to eat cleanly at school.
